header_quote: "I offer a great value for one simple reason: I want you to be happy."
bio_heading: A specialty built on real experience
bio_paragraphs: Tax Uncomplicated, the American headquarters, and Klemsen Consulting, the local Korean branch office, are here to help.
I offer a different kind of tax preparation service and financial management advice. You will never feel rushed or pressured.

A number of tax law changes, including the Affordable Care Act provisions, can be complicated. Whether you're a first time filer, live abroad, or you have an even more complex tax situation, you need a tax preparer who is familiar with your situation. Having lived overseas for more than 17 years, I have developed a specialty in preparing tax returns for expats, including filing Foreign Bank Account Reports (FBARs) and making sure you meet the Foreign Account Tax Compliance Act (FATCA) filing requirements.
I always give reasonable, upfront quotes so there will never be any surprises.
I can help you regardless of how complicated or unique your situation or how long its been since you've filed a tax return.
I offer a great value for one simple reason: I want you to be happy.
